title: AttentionVariant + GQA implementation
description:
Implement the AttentionVariant trait and GQA/SlidingWindow attention in the synapse-inference registry.

src/registry/attention.rs:
- GQAAttention implementing AttentionVariant:
  - Q projection: hidden → num_heads * head_dim
  - K projection: hidden → num_kv_heads * head_dim
  - V projection: hidden → num_kv_heads * head_dim
  - O projection: num_heads * head_dim → hidden
  - GQA head repeat: expand KV heads to match Q heads via repeat_interleave
  - Apply RoPE to Q and K before attention computation
  - KV-cache support: prefill (full attention) and decode (single token vs cached K/V)
  - Causal masking for prefill
- SlidingWindowAttention: wraps GQA, masks beyond window_size
- Document that MHA (num_kv_heads==num_heads) and MQA (num_kv_heads==1) are GQA special cases

src/registry/position.rs:
- RoPEPosition implementing PositionVariant: precompute cos/sin caches, rotate Q/K pairs
- LearnedPosition implementing PositionVariant: add learned embeddings

Tests (mandatory):
- GQA output shape [batch, seq, hidden]
- GQA with num_kv_heads==num_heads == MHA result
- GQA with num_kv_heads==1 == MQA result
- KV-cache: prefill(10) + decode(1) matches full forward(11) (bit-exact f32)
- Sliding window: attention weights zero beyond window
- Parameter count = 4 projections with correct shapes
- RoPE: positions affect output

Pass/fail:
- Correct output shapes
- KV-cache output matches full recompute
- Sliding window restricts span
- RoPE correctly applied
